channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Key Races and Political Stakes in Tuesday’s Primaries Across Six States
item.description: On May 19, 2026, six states—Alabama, Georgia, Idaho, Kentucky, Oregon, and Pennsylvania—hold primaries, making it one of the busiest days in the election calendar. The spotlight is on Kentucky, where ...

item.title: Kenya Implements Targeted Ebola Screening Instead of Blanket Quarantines
item.description: Kenya has decided against putting all travellers and truck drivers under blanket quarantines as part of its Ebola preparedness plan, even as outbreaks continue in Uganda and the Democratic Republic of...

item.title: Google Launches Gemini Omni AI for Conversational Video and Media Editing
item.description: At Google I/O 2026, Google unveiled Gemini Omni, a new multimodal artificial intelligence system designed to simplify creative workflows across video, images, audio, and text. Gemini Omni allows users...

item.title: Zara McDermott targeted by AI deep-fake after platonic kiss from Joey Essex
item.description: Zara McDermott, former Love Island contestant and current partner of singer Louis Tomlinson, has been targeted by an AI-generated deep-fake following a platonic kiss from reality TV personality Joey E...

item.title: Behind the Scenes with Brigitte Bardot in 'Babette Goes to War' (1959)
item.description: The portraits of Brigitte Bardot taken during the filming of 'Babette Goes to War' in 1959 provide a unique glimpse into the French actress at a pivotal moment in her career. Known primarily for her i...

item.title: Jefferson and Madison’s Views on Religious Freedom and Government
item.description: On May 17, 2026, thousands of Americans gathered at the National Mall for 'Rededicate 250,' a prayer rally aimed at honoring the United States ahead of its 250th anniversary. Led by U.S. House Speaker...

item.title: Iran warns of wider conflict if US resumes attacks amidst stalled peace talks
item.description: Tensions between the United States, Israel, and Iran continue to escalate, six weeks after former President Donald Trump paused Operation Epic Fury for a ceasefire. Iran warned on May 20, 2026, that a...

item.title: UK considers exclusive £5 million investor visa offering 3-year route to settlement for wealthy foreigners
item.description: The United Kingdom dey reason a new investor visa wey go need at least £5 million investment from rich foreign nationals. This visa go follow strict vetting and e go only allow money enter fast-growin...

item.title: Dart plans to introduce facial and palm recognition for BRT commuters
item.description: Dar es Salaam, Tanzania – The Dar Rapid Transit Agency (Dart) is considering rolling out a biometric ticketing system for its Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) passengers to improve convenience and cut losses f...

item.title: Sierra Leone's First Lady retains London council flat despite living abroad
item.description: Fatima Jabbe-Bio, First Lady of Sierra Leone, has been listed as the tenant of a modest two-bedroom council flat in Southwark, London, since 2007, despite residing in Sierra Leone since her husband, P...

item.title: Economist Calls for Property Rights Reform as Informal Settlements Affect 70% of World Population
item.description: According to institutional economist Elena Panaritis, informal settlements and lack of formal property rights have trapped nearly 70 percent of the world population. This situation create cycle of pov...

item.description: The Vice Chancellor of Arthur Jarvis University, Cross River State, Barr Joe Edet, don officially declare say him wan contest for Cross River South Senatorial seat under African Democratic Congress (A...

item.title: Apple’s global Formula One streaming ambitions face delays due to existing broadcaster contracts
item.description: Apple has secured a five-year deal to stream Formula One races in the United States on Apple TV, marking a significant step into live sports broadcasting. However, expanding this globally could take c...

item.title: Gazini Ganados participates in the inaugural MGI All Stars swimsuit competition
item.description: Filipino beauty queen Gazini Ganados made a stunning appearance at the inaugural MGI All Stars swimsuit event held as part of the Miss Grand International All Stars pageant activities. Known for her p...

item.title: M&S criticises proposed supermarket price caps amid profit recovery following cyber-attack
item.description: Marks & Spencer’s chief executive, Stuart Machin, has criticised government proposals for supermarket price caps, describing them as 'completely preposterous'. Machin highlighted that M&S had not been...

item.title: Toronto man found not criminally responsible for violent acts granted escorted city visits
item.description: Kenroy Samuel, a Toronto resident diagnosed with schizophrenia, major depressive disorder, and cannabis use disorder, was found not criminally responsible for stabbing a woman and killing his brother ...

item.title: Analysis of Canadian Bank Stocks, Industrial REITs, and Copper Market Trends
item.description: Scott Barlow, Market Strategist at The Globe and Mail, presents a comprehensive overview of recent research on Canadian financial markets. Bank of America analyst Ebrahim Poonawala highlighted TD Bank...

item.title: India and Italy Strengthen Bilateral Ties with Special Strategic Partnership
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, during the final leg of his five-nation tour, visited Italy and held extensive discussions with Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Sergio Mattarella. The...

item.title: CCM Women's Wing Leader Mary Chatanda Under Fire for Saying She Would Eliminate CHADEMA if Given Power
item.description: Mary Chatanda, who is the national chairperson of the ruling Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) women's wing, has caused big anger among many Tanzanians after her speech on 18th May 2026 in Migoli village, Iri...

item.title: Comelec warns candidates on premature campaigning ahead of barangay and SK elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has issued a stern warning to candidates for the upcoming barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) elections regarding premature campaigning. Chairman George Erwin ...
